title: POST /api/login with valid credentials returns token
description: Verify POST /api/login with email=admin@academia.com and password=admin123 returns 200 with a Bearer token and user data.

title: POST /api/login with invalid credentials returns 401
description: Verify POST /api/login with wrong password returns 401 unauthorized error.

title: GET /api/me returns authenticated user
description: Verify GET /api/me with valid Bearer token returns the current user's name, email and role.

title: GET /api/dashboard/stats returns counts
description: Verify GET /api/dashboard/stats returns estudiantes, instructores, clases, and inscripciones_activas counts as integers.

title: GET /api/estudiantes returns paginated list
description: Verify GET /api/estudiantes returns a paginated response with data array, total, current_page, and last_page fields.

title: POST /api/estudiantes creates a student
description: Verify POST /api/estudiantes with nombre and fecha_nacimiento creates a new student and returns 201 with the created record.

title: PUT /api/estudiantes/{id} updates a student
description: Verify PUT /api/estudiantes/{id} updates the student's nombre and returns the updated record.

title: DELETE /api/estudiantes/{id} deletes student with cascade
description: Verify DELETE /api/estudiantes/{id} removes the student and any related inscripciones, pagos and asistencias.

title: POST /api/estudiantes with missing nombre returns 422
description: Verify POST /api/estudiantes without nombre field returns 422 validation error.

title: GET /api/instructores returns paginated list
description: Verify GET /api/instructores returns paginated instructor list with nombre and especialidad fields.

title: POST /api/instructores creates an instructor
description: Verify POST /api/instructores with nombre creates a new instructor and returns 201.

title: PUT /api/instructores/{id} updates an instructor
description: Verify PUT /api/instructores/{id} updates nombre and especialidad and returns the updated record.

title: GET /api/niveles returns array of levels
description: Verify GET /api/niveles returns a plain array (not paginated) with at least 4 levels including Principiante, Intermedio, Avanzado, Competencia.

title: GET /api/clases returns paginated list with nivel and instructor
description: Verify GET /api/clases returns paginated classes each with nested nivel and instructor objects.

title: POST /api/clases creates a class
description: Verify POST /api/clases with nombre_clase, id_nivel, id_instructor and cupo creates a class and returns 201.

title: POST /api/clases with invalid cupo returns 422
description: Verify POST /api/clases with cupo=0 or cupo=100 returns 422 validation error since cupo must be between 1 and 50.

title: GET /api/inscripciones returns paginated list with estudiante and clase
description: Verify GET /api/inscripciones returns paginated enrollments with nested estudiante and clase objects.

title: POST /api/inscripciones creates an enrollment
description: Verify POST /api/inscripciones with id_estudiante and id_clase creates an enrollment and returns 201.

title: PUT /api/inscripciones/{id} updates enrollment estado
description: Verify PUT /api/inscripciones/{id} with estado=Suspendido updates the enrollment status.

title: GET /api/pagos returns paginated payments
description: Verify GET /api/pagos returns paginated payments with monto, metodo_pago and estado fields.

title: POST /api/pagos creates a payment
description: Verify POST /api/pagos with id_inscripcion, monto and metodo_pago creates a payment and returns 201.

title: GET /api/asistencias returns paginated attendance records
description: Verify GET /api/asistencias returns paginated records with fecha_clase and asistio fields.

title: POST /api/asistencias creates an attendance record
description: Verify POST /api/asistencias with id_inscripcion, fecha_clase and asistio=Si creates a record and returns 201.

title: Unauthenticated request returns 401
description: Verify GET /api/estudiantes without Authorization header returns 401 unauthorized.

title: POST /api/logout revokes token
description: Verify POST /api/logout invalidates the token so subsequent requests with same token return 401.
